## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Screenshots/GIFs are very welcome for visual changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally (builds the game + runs the headless suite)
- [ ] No external dependencies, libraries, or asset files added — everything stays in code
- [ ] Species/move/item/map **ids were appended, not reordered** (existing saves must keep working)
- [ ] All creatures, names, art, and music are **original** (no copyrighted characters or assets)
- [ ] New mechanics come with a test in `test/test.js` (or a note on why one isn't possible)
